name: DaTang HuaYin Electric Power Co., LTD
summary: DaTang HuaYin Electric Power Co., Ltd. engages in the production of power in Hunan province and other regions in China. It also develops various power point and non-electric projects. The company's transportation capacity is 6100.5 MW. DaTang HuaYin Electric Power Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Changsha, China.
